content_body: Bob and I enjoyed our stay here so much!  We got into the hot tub last night, shot pool the night before, roasted marshmallows in the outdoor fireplace, and made s’mores.  We loved going to the Swan Drive-in.  This is my first time to ever stay in a cabin and now I’m hooked!  We are already planning a fall getaway weekend.  But now reality is here and it’s back home today.  We will be back!  Panama City, FL
title: First Time to Stay in a Cabin ~ HOOKED!
